brain_consensus.narrative: Fear has a stranglehold on the market as the Fear & Greed Index sinks to 33, yet stablecoin reserves are quietly expanding—a classic divergence that marked the August 2024 bottom. With BTC pinned in a sideways regime and 30-day momentum fading, this setup echoes the accumulation zone that preceded the Q4 breakout, suggesting the current anxiety is laying the foundation for the next leg higher.
brain_consensus.headline: Fear Grips While Smart Money Loads Up
